article_meta.title: News Law & the Courts Black Lives Matter Director Spent Millions in Donations on Homes, Shopping, Vacations, Indictment

reasoning: Mostly neutral, attributes allegations and penalties, but echoes some of the source’s framing (e.g., “personal luxuries,” “pattern”) and omits mitigating context (Cullors’ denial). Sources_represented collapses perspectives into the outlet rather than listing distinct voices.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses mildly interpretive terms like “personal luxuries” and “pattern,” but largely sticks to attributed allegations.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: Most claims are attributed to the indictment; the “pattern” assertion is thematic rather than evidentiary.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Avoids declaring guilt or motives; evaluative statements are limited and mostly contextual.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No dramatic or alarmist tone beyond a couple of mildly charged phrases.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks in the model’s own voice.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: Does not ascribe motives or mental states.
custom_reasoning.slant: Leans negative by omitting exculpatory note that Cullors denied wrongdoing; no counter-perspective from BLM/Dickerson (though article offers little).
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Omits the article’s note that Cullors was not charged and denied wrongdoing.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Includes “personal luxuries”/“luxury vacations,” which are subjective.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Generally neutral; no ideologically loaded labels beyond mild phrasing.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Emphasizes alleged misuse and broader controversies; downplays mitigating context.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: No clear deference to elite or grassroots sources.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than source but retains some loaded framing and generalization.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Lists only the publication as a source; does not distinguish indictment/prosecutors, BLM figures, or noted denials as separate perspectives.
